articles.author: Rio Yamat, Ap Airlines, Travel Writer
articles.title: Bills to pay FAA and TSA workers during shutdowns get introduced but keep stalling in Congress - AP News
articles.description: Members of Congress have repeatedly introduced bills to ensure the federal employees who control air traffic and conduct airport security screenings get paid during government shutdowns. The Keep America Flying Act. The Keep Air Travel Safe Act. The Aviation …
articles.content:
The Aviation Funding Solvency Act. The Keep America Flying Act. The Keep Air Travel Safe Act. The Aviation Funding Stability Act.
Again and again, members of Congress have dusted off the same idea: … [+7450 chars]
